author: Jdthomas24
description: Monitor device check-in health across Zigbee, Z-Wave, Matter, Hub Mesh, LAN, Virtual and Hub Variable — learns each device's normal pattern and alerts you when something goes quiet.
releaseNotes: v1.5.10 — Bug fix: scan pipeline could stall silently with no error logged on installs with many devices and weeks of scan history. Groovy's BigDecimal math doesn't auto-round, and since each check-in sample is smoothed from the previous sample recursively, decimal precision compounded every single scan with nothing ever resetting it — after weeks of scans this bloated state.history to several KB per device, large enough on bigger installs to stall the scan pipeline at the state-persistence layer before it could even start, with nothing caught or logged as an error. Elapsed and smoothed check-in values are now rounded to 2 decimal places at the point of computation so this can't recur, and a one-time migration on update rounds all existing stored samples back down automatically — logged only when there's actually something found to clean up. No action needed beyond opening the app and tapping Done once after updating; Force Scan should complete normally afterward.
